name: Currenc Group Inc.
summary: Unless otherwise indicated or the context otherwise requires, references in this section to Seamless, it, or their, generally refer to Seamless Group Inc. prior to the Business Combination and to Currenc Group Inc. after giving effect to the Business Combination. Overview Currenc Group Inc. (the Company) is a limited liability company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on March 8, 2021. It is an investment holding company headquartered in Singapore.
